evals.name: basic_violation_report
evals.prompt: 我有一个交通违法视频，位于examples/video1.json，需要通过成都交警微信公众号举报这起违法事件，车牌号是川AA91637
evals.expected_output: Successfully generates AutoGLM task with correct violation data from JSON and executes the complete reporting workflow including mitmproxy GPS mocking

evals.name: custom_location_report
evals.prompt: 用examples/video1.json的数据举报交通违法，但是地点描述改为'人民南路一段和天府广场'
evals.expected_output: Successfully processes violation data from JSON and uses custom location '人民南路一段和天府广场' in the violation description

evals.name: check_prerequisites
evals.prompt: 我想举报交通违法，但不知道系统是否配置好了，请帮我检查 prerequisites
evals.expected_output: Checks and reports status of: ADB connection, mitmproxy installation, Open-AutoGLM availability, JSON file existence, and helper scripts
